name: ACP Session Manager
description: Manage ACP sub-sessions lifecycle with native gateway approval integration.

maxSessions.description: Maximum number of concurrent managed ACP sessions.

sessionTtlHours.description: Session time-to-live in hours before automatic cleanup.

approvalTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout in milliseconds for approval requests.

cwd.description: Working directory for ACP sessions. Defaults to the OpenClaw workspace.

stateDir.description: Directory for session state persistence. Defaults to {cwd}/.acp-sessions.

permissionMode.description: Permission policy for ACP agents. approve-reads auto-approves read/search, approve-all auto-approves everything, deny-all requires approval for all operations.

approvalMode.description: Which gateway approval method surfaces permission popups. 'exec' (default) uses exec.approval.request, natively forwarded to the Control UI by the ACP translator. 'plugin' uses plugin.approval.request (requires UI/translator support for plugin.approval.requested events).

agents.description: Custom agent command overrides. Keys are agent names (used in acp_launch agent_id), values are shell commands. Built-in defaults: qoder=qodercli --acp, claude=npx -y @agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp@latest, codex=npx -y @agentclientprotocol/codex-acp@latest, gemini=gemini --acp, opencode=npx -y opencode-ai acp, kimi=kimi acp, qwen=qwen --acp, cursor=cursor-agent acp, copilot=copilot --acp --stdio, kilocode=npx -y @kilocode/cli acp, trae=traecli acp serve, openclaw=openclaw acp.

maxSessions.label: Max Sessions
maxSessions.help: Maximum number of concurrent ACP sub-sessions.

sessionTtlHours.label: Session TTL (hours)
sessionTtlHours.help: Sessions inactive for longer than this are automatically cleaned up.

approvalTimeoutMs.label: Approval Timeout (ms)
approvalTimeoutMs.help: How long to wait for an approval decision before auto-rejecting.

cwd.label: Working Directory
cwd.help: Default working directory for spawned ACP agent sessions.

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory for session persistence and recovery.

permissionMode.label: Permission Mode
permissionMode.help: Controls which operations require explicit approval. 'approve-reads' is recommended for most use cases.

approvalMode.label: Approval Method
approvalMode.help: Which gateway approval method surfaces popups. 'exec' (default) works with the built-in ACP translator. 'plugin' requires UI support for plugin.approval.requested.

agents.label: Agent Commands
agents.help: Override or add ACP agent launch commands. Format: {"agent-name": "command --flags"}. User entries override built-in defaults.
